reference: I have been trying to conceive for a year. My boyfriend and I have never used birth control. I ovulated on the fifth of September. I bled lightly for three days around the eighth to the eleventh. I have had unprotected intercourse since then. I have been experiencing nausea and vomiting for about a week, intermittently. Could I be pregnant?
text: I'm going to try to get some numbers. My boyfriend and I have had a little bit of an urgency. I ovulated on the 5th of September. I bled lightly for 3 days around 8:00 to 11:00. I have had unprotected intercourse since then. I have been experiencing nausea and vomiting for about a week, intermittently. Could I be pregnant?
